basic_details.job_title: CSMCRI Functional Area Expert Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI)
basic_details.short_information: The Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI) has officially announced the Functional Area Expert Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official CSMCRI website. Candidates holding an Engineering degree (Environmental/Civil/Chemical) or a Master's degree in Meteorology, Environmental Sciences, Environment Management, Environmental Studies, Industrial Pollution Control, Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Statistics, or Atmospheric Sciences are eligible to apply through email up to 16 July 2026. The age limit has not been specified

qualification.education_qualification: Engineering (Environmental/Civil/Chemical) or Master's degree in Meteorology/Environmental Sciences/Environment Management/Environmental Studies/Industrial Pollution Control/Physics/Chemistry/Mathematics/Statistics/Atmospheric Sciences
qualification.details: Engineering (Environmental/Civil/Chemical) or Master's degree in Meteorology/Environmental Sciences/Environment Management/Environmental Studies/Industrial Pollution Control/Physics/Chemistry/Mathematics/Statistics/Atmospheric Sciences

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSMCRI Functional Area Expert Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSMCRI Functional Area Expert Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSMCRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: CSMCRI Functional Area Expert Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CSMCRI Functional Area Expert Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSMCRI Functional Area Expert Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSMCRI Functional Area Expert position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Functional Area Expert post at CSMCRI is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Functional Area Expert post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Functional Area Expert position at the Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the Functional Area Expert post at CSMCRI is to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with necessary documents to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Functional Area Expert role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an Engineering degree in Environmental, Civil, or Chemical fields, or a Master's degree in Meteorology, Environmental Sciences, Environment Management, or related subjects.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the CSMCRI Functional Area Expert recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Functional Area Expert position at CSMCRI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Functional Area Expert position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Functional Area Expert role at CSMCRI involves initial shortlisting of applications followed by an online interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Functional Area Expert position at CSMCRI is a contractual job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q8. Where is CSMCRI located?
faq.answer: Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSMCRI) is located in Bhavnagar, Gujarat, with the pincode 364002.

faq.question: Q9. Will there be an interview for the Functional Area Expert position?
faq.answer: Yes, after the initial shortlisting of applications, candidates will be invited for an online interview as part of the selection process for the Functional Area Expert role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the CSMCRI Functional Area Expert recruitment can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
